item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: First reading, referred to Labor & Commerce.
item.description: First reading, referred to Labor & Commerce.

item.title: 👍Jeff Pack - Washington Citizens Against Unfair Taxes
item.description: Jeff Pack signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Citizens Against Unfair Taxes.

item.title: This Week In The Senate - Week 2: Housing, affordability and MLK Day - Washington Senate Democrats
item.description: News article "This Week In The Senate - Week 2: Housing, affordability and MLK Day - Washington Senate Democrats" from Senate Democrats.

item.title: ❓Tammy Fellin - Department of Labor & Industries
item.description: Tammy Fellin signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Department of Labor & Industries.

item.title: 👍💵Jean Hill - Washington State Catholic Conference
item.description: Jean Hill signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Catholic Conference. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Lydia Zepeda - League of Women Voters Washington
item.description: Lydia Zepeda signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent League of Women Voters Washington.

item.title: Saldaña, Thomas introduce Domestic Workers Bill of Rights to advance worker protections, equity - Sen. Rebecca Saldaña
item.description: News article "Saldaña, Thomas introduce Domestic Workers Bill of Rights to advance worker protections, equity - Sen. Rebecca Saldaña" from Senate Democrats.

item.title: Saldaña y Thomas presentan proyecto de ley de derechos para personas trabajadoras del hogar para fortalecer protecciones y equidad laboral - Sen. Rebecca Saldaña
item.description: News article "Saldaña y Thomas presentan proyecto de ley de derechos para personas trabajadoras del hogar para fortalecer protecciones y equidad laboral - Sen. Rebecca Saldaña" from Senate Democrats.

item.description: Ana Bello signed up to testify Pro.

item.description: Cindy Tan signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: Minority; do not pass.
